This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
WVBR records
WVBR (Radio Station : Cornell University)
Schoonmaker, James
35-9-1739
6.4 cubic feet. 6.4 cubic feet.
1946-2000s. Correspondence, Memorabilia, Photographs, Reports Collection includes reports; letter; station log (1948-1951); minutes of the Cornell Radio Guild, Inc. (1971); Board minutes (1968); published Program Guides (1959-1965); and other materials pertaining to Cornell radio station WVBR. Collection material in English 2074685
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
November 2009
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, November 2009Evan Earle, April 2011
Date modified:
RMC Staff, September 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Collection includes reports; letter; station log (1948-1951); minutes of the Cornell Radio Guild, Inc. (1971); Board minutes (1968); published Program Guides (1959-1965); and other materials pertaining to Cornell radio station WVBR and its shows, including Bound For Glory with Phil Shapiro.
RELATED MATERIALS
See also collection #37-7-m.1055 for audio and transcript of the 1952 student raid of WVBR; Robert A. Mayers WVBR - Live Audio, #35-9-3768; and Ted Osborn, WVBR Records, #35-9-3512. Also Bound for Glory records, #35-9-4277.
Cite As:
WVBR records, #35-9-1739. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
College radio stations. Radio stations -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Cornell Radio Guild WVBR (Radio Station : Cornell University)

Existence and Location of Copies
Also availible on CD-2668.Items removed from binder photo and clipping book153-11Newspaper clippings1940s153Newspaper advertisement clippings1950s154Misc. items, Cornell Radio Guild clippings, letter to station about signal, station position employment advertisements155Photographs, includes shots from Willard Straight Hall1950s-1970s156Newspaper clippings1970s157Photographs of Linden Avenue studio purchase and renovation1970s158Photographs of station equipment159Photographs of a picnic broadcast event, includes pie tossing1970s1510Photographs of people involved with the station. also includes a photo of the Dutch Kitchen, Fred's Record Shop, and a photo inscribed to WVBR by President Deane Waldo Malott of Dwight Eisenhower giving his lecture at Barton Hall in May of 19631960s-1990s1511Items collected by James H Schoonmaker15The Know-it-alls Guide to WVBR; Assorted Guidelines on running a radio station; Internal correspondence, including a letter about possibly covering Summer Jam at Watkins Glen from Sol Taishoff, editor-in-chief of Broadcasting magazine; WVBR-AM (Carrier Current) Sheet; Cornell Countryman report on the WVBR; Newspaper Clippings on WVBR; WVBR Advertisements and Schedules; Photographs.1971-197319771512Black Affairs Department1973-19751513Cornell Radio Guild: Constitution, Bylaws, Proposals, Reports19701-9741514News clippings on Professor Rose K.
